Border Radius

Example Name Code

.0625em

Border Radius XS

This is XS-size border radius.		 --as-border-radius-xs

.1875em

Border Radius S

This is S-size border radius.		 --as-border-radius-s

.3125em

Border Radius

This is default-size border radius.		 --as-border-radius

.5em

Border Radius M

This is M-size border radius.		 --as-border-radius-m

1em

Border Radius L

This is L-size border radius.		 --as-border-radius-l

999px

Border Radius PILL

This is PILL border radius, for creating pill shaped objects like tags or badges.		 --as-border-radius-pill

50%

Border Radius CIRCLE

This is CIRCLE border radius, for creating rounded objects, user avatars or similar.		 --as-border-radius-circle
